last_episode_to_air.overview: A late-night break-in threatens everything Muncie holds dear. Meanwhile, he has proof of his innocence — but will the world ever hear the whole truth?

last_episode_to_air.name: The Handmaid's Tale
last_episode_to_air.overview: June reflects on her experiences in Gilead and decides what to do next.

last_episode_to_air.name: Comfort and Joy
last_episode_to_air.overview: It’s Christmas 1945, the first peacetime Christmas after the war. With Helen feeling under the weather, it’s fallen on James to take on the Darrowby Nativity play. Siegfried is back at Mrs Stokes’s Farm to see Hilda the goat, who’s been up to more mischief. Mrs Hall is keen to enter the Drovers' darts competition and scoop the first prize: a fresh turkey.

last_episode_to_air.name: Curtain Call
last_episode_to_air.overview: Vox (and the Vees, I guess) is hosting a party so everyone can watch him take over Heaven - and you're all invited!

last_episode_to_air.name: Feeding the Rat
last_episode_to_air.overview: A climber dies after a cliff fall and a witness claims that his climbing partner is responsible.

title: Dawn of the Planet of the Apes

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 10
last_episode_to_air.overview: Vegan Izzie meets hippy Izaac and everything is groovy - until Izaac orders beef tacos. Josh's only previous date was 'brutal'. Can Jack from Sheffield make it better?

last_episode_to_air.name: Until It's Time for You to Go
last_episode_to_air.overview: Vera starts to grumble that she's not receiving enough attention, and she isn't the only one feeling left out. Alec is also having a crisis of confidence, sure that Zoe intends to abandon him for a younger, fitter man.

last_episode_to_air.name: Into the Fire
last_episode_to_air.overview: The rebels make their move—and so does Juliette.

last_episode_to_air.name: The Auteur
last_episode_to_air.overview: Her choices have unknowingly led to deadly consequences, but Anna can still have it all - for a price.

last_episode_to_air.name: Dance in the Country
last_episode_to_air.overview: With Sophie in peril and the entire family's reputation at stake, the Bridgertons must rely on the ton's most powerful currency: scandal.

last_episode_to_air.name: Monsters
last_episode_to_air.overview: With Georgia's freedom on the line, the trial reaches a dramatic conclusion. Ginny takes a page from her mom's playbook.
